rows.label: qev031301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Aah! The more I learn, the more
the underlying strength of you
Earthlings terrifies me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hey? Why did Earthlings
become so skilled at war?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev031301_SEL0011
rows.name:
Answer that it was cultivated through
a long history of numerous wars.

rows.label: qev031301_JNK0020
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev031301_SEL0021
rows.name:
Answer that the Bias would likely
be stronger if a war occurred.

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0003
rows.name:
I see, your explanation is
interesting. That sort of wisdom
must be your greatest weapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0004
rows.name:
We of the Tree Clan continued our war with the Cavern
Clan for ten thousand years, but in the end, we could
never devise anything like the Art of War.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0005
rows.name: ...But what about your kind?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0006
rows.name:
Within a history of merely a few thousand years,
geniuses like Sun Tzu and Clausewitz created
numerous tactics and applied them to battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0007
rows.name:
...It's frustrating, but if the Bias and
Earthlings were to go to war, the Bias would
probably be wiped out in a matter of days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'm glad you say that, but if
Earthlings and Bias went to war,
I bet the Earthlings would win![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0009
rows.name:
It's not because you have superior weapons,
nor is it because your movements are agile.
It's because you possess wonderful tactics![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Have you ever read
Sun Tzu or Clausewitz?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0011
rows.name:
Such wonderful wisdom of war is something even we of
the Tree Clan, who have waged a long war with the
Cavern Clan for ten thousand years, do not possess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0012
rows.name:
Yeah... I'll study the Art of War while
I'm in NLA and become a brilliant tactician
who leads every battle to victory![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0013
rows.name:
The era of waging war with just brute strength is
over! As long as I have the Art of War, neither the
Cavern Clan nor the Growth will be anything to fear![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0014
rows.name:
...What the hell have you been talking
about this whole time? Earthlings are
stronger... The Art of War...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0015
rows.name:
I've always thought this, but
Sajif... You're an idiot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0016
rows.name:
Ngh... It's you, Vio Penga! Well, a brute-force
idiot like you, who's basically a gorida, wouldn't
understand even if you took your whole life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0017
rows.name:
In the war with those Cavern bastards,
I killed way more of them than you
did! You're always all talk![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0018
rows.name:
Grrr... But! From now on, if
I have the Art of War...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Hey? Do you really think a puny
Earthling could beat a Bias?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_JNK0030
rows.name: Will Win

rows.label: qev031301_SEL0031
rows.name:
Declare that Earthlings
would be victorious.

rows.label: qev031301_JNK0040
rows.name: Will Not Win

rows.label: qev031301_SEL0041
rows.name: State that they would lose to the Bias.

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0020
rows.name:
Hahahaha! You're a funny one! I
don't hate reckless guys like you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0021
rows.name:
But we'd never lose to Earthlings! Even if
you bring out this Art of War or whatever,
we'll crush it all with sheer power![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0022
rows.name:
Hahahaha! You're an honest one! Well,
rest assured. We have no intention of
starting anything with Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0023
rows.name:
But if a war ever did break out, even if
you bring out this Art of War or whatever,
we'd crush it all with sheer power![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0024
rows.name:
Sajif, stop reading that useless
junk and train that scrawny
fennerc-like body of yours a little![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0025
rows.name:
Guh, I can't back down after being insulted that
much! Then I'll utilize the Art of War right now
and take down at least one fortress for you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0026
rows.name:
...I learned that one of the tactics
in the Art of War is assassination![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0027
rows.name:
If you kill the person at the top of the chain of command,
the military organization collapses all at once, and you
can take it down without leading a massive army![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0028
rows.name:
So... I want you to assassinate Nagi
Kentarou, the man who commands this NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0029
rows.name:
After that, I'll suppress NLA in a single
night and prove that the Art of War is
correct! ...Well? Will you do it!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031301_SEL0051
rows.name: Nod forcefully.

rows.label: qev031301_JNK0060
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev031301_SEL0061
rows.name:
Panic and refuse, saying
you can't do that.

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0030
rows.name:
...You're an idiot too. If you do that,
the ones who'll suffer the most are
Earthlings, so why would you do it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0031
rows.name:
Ngh... That's true... To think Vio Penga
would hit me with a sound argument...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0032
rows.name:
Indeed, considering how much they've helped
us, it wouldn't be a good idea to cause
trouble... Sorry, I'll reflect on this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0033
rows.name:
...Then head to the Lotus Fortress
Construction Site, where the Growth
are attempting to build a new fortress.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0034
rows.name:
Assassinate only their leader and stop
the construction of the fortress! Of
course, I'll pay you a success fee![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0035
rows.name:
Wonderful! You're a modern-day
Sun Tzu! Then make sure you
assassinate only the leader![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0036
rows.name:
If you kill the other underlings as
well, it'll be nothing but the brute
force Vio Penga talks about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0037
rows.name:
Don't defeat anyone other than the leader
on your way back either! Prove the validity
of Earthling tactics brilliantly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0042
rows.name:
The Lotus Fortress Construction Site is in Nightglow
Forest! Don't bother with the foot soldiers on the
way in or out, just assassinate the leader for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0043
rows.name:
Heh... If I can prove the power
of the Art of War with this, I'll
teach it to the other Bias too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0044
rows.name:
If we do that, the Cavern Clan will be no
match for us. With this intellect, I'll
bring an end to the long war immediately![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0045
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]! It seems you successfully
assassinated only their leader.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0046
rows.name:
Heh... Having lost their leader, those
Growth bastards fell to pieces, and we
annihilated them with just a few Bias![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0047
rows.name:
This operation was a huge success!
Even the Bias can fight like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0048
rows.name:
Hey, how did it feel participating
in my operation? Do I have what it
takes to be a top-tier tactician?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_JNK0070
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: qev031301_SEL0071
rows.name:
Praise him, saying it was
a brilliant operation.

rows.label: qev031301_JNK0080
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev031301_SEL0081
rows.name:
Criticize him, saying you
dislike underhanded operations.

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0049
rows.name:
Isn't that right, isn't that right!
Having an Earthling I respect say
that makes me very happy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0050
rows.name:
...How about it, Vio? Do you still
say the Art of War is meaningless?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0051
rows.name:
Ngh... You're an Earthling who's
more like a Bias than I am.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0052
rows.name:
...But how about it, Vio? Do you still
say the Art of War is meaningless?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0053
rows.name:
Guh... It was certainly amazing... Normally,
with that kind of fighting force, you
couldn't defeat that many enemies...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0054
rows.name:
Even if... I, Vio Penga,
had been fighting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0055
rows.name:
Then admit it! The Art of War
is necessary for the future
battles of the Bias as well![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0056
rows.name:
...I don't like such
underhanded methods, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0057
rows.name:
...I get it. It's true that
with this method, we can avoid
losing comrades in battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0058
rows.name:
Exactly... That is the very essence of the Art
of War! It is meant to destroy the enemy, but
also to save the lives of your comrades![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0059
rows.name:
...Thank you, [ST:playername ]! Not only did we prove the Art
of War is correct, but it seems I've gained
someone who understands among my comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0060
rows.name:
I'll be generous with the reward. Giving
plenty of rewards to reliable individuals
is also part of the Art of War![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0061
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]... You ended up defeating enemies other than
the leader, didn't you. Then it's nothing more
than the brute force Vio talks about...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0062
rows.name:
Hahahahaha! You did the right thing! I don't
know about the Art of War or whatever, but
there's no need to do something so troublesome![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0063
rows.name:
If enemies appear before you, you slaughter
them all! You provided proof that this
is the only way to fight a war.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0064
rows.name:
Guh... But with the Art of
War, you can defeat many
enemies with a small force...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0065
rows.name:
...There's no need to listen to this
fennerc bastard's talking anymore![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0066
rows.name:
Even so, it was a splendid battle.
Next time, please spar with me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirmation

rows.label: qev031301_SEL0091
rows.name: Accept, saying you'd love to spar.

rows.label: qev031301_JNK0100
rows.name: Denial

rows.label: qev031301_SEL0101
rows.name:
Refuse, saying there's no
need for pointless conflict.

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0067
rows.name:
Just as I expected! You're an Earthling,
but you have far more Bias-like
nobility than someone like Sajif![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0068
rows.name:
...It's true that we were comrades just
now. Sajif is an idiot, but someone smart
like you is reliable to have around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0069
rows.name:
So if we ever stand on the battlefield
together, I'll leave my back to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0070
rows.name:
Guh... I can't argue back at all...
Is this what they mean by "a defeated
general speaks not of valor"...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031301_MSG0071
rows.name:
Hmph... Take your reward. Next time, I will
absolutely use a trustworthy soldier and
suppress the enemy with the Art of War...[ST:wait ]
